corrected_statement: ALTER TABLE main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_cid_daily_nwa ALTER COLUMN `IsCreditReportValidCB` COMMENT 'DWH-computed in SP_Dim_Customer: 1 when NOT (PlayerLevelID=4 AND AccountTypeID<>2) AND LabelID NOT IN (26,30) AND NOT (CountryID=250 AND CID NOT IN (3400616,10526243,10842855,11464063,21547142,34537826)).
